ocr_findings.description: Lesson intro illustration (scissors cutting paper) and the DBMS flow diagram (ユーザー→アプリケーションソフトウェア→DBMS→データベース) are both replaced by image placeholders '![img-0.jpeg]' and '![img-1.jpeg]'. Diagram node labels (操作, ユーザー, アプリケーションソフトウェア, データベース管理システム, データベース) present in the image are absent from OCR.
Page number '444' appears at the bottom-left of the image but is not present in the OCR output. Minor omission.

reviewer_notes: Content page for Lesson 13-04 データベース管理システムとSQL. All prose text is accurately captured including the DBMS definition, the intro callout text ('必要な部分だけを取り出す'), and the key terms 選択/結合/排他制御. Two figures are image-replaced (low severity). The superscript reading 'エスキューエル' for SQL and 'デービーエムエス' for DBMS visible in the image are not captured in OCR but the acronyms themselves are correct.
